refnamediv.refpurpose: Generate SLICO superpixels with OpenCV contrib.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [labels, contours] = imsuperpixels(image) [labels, contours] = imsuperpixels(image, regionSize, ruler, iterations)

listitem.para: Approximate superpixel region size. Default is 20.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imsuperpixels uses OpenCV 5 ximgproc SLICO. labels are zero-based and contours is a uint8 boundary image.

refsection.title: Examples
